client.closed_season_msg: We'll be back soon. Thank you for visiting!
client.order_sent_msg: The kitchen has it. Track it here:

step.preparando_desc: The kitchen is preparing your dishes.
step.listo_desc: Your waiter will bring it to the table.

login.title: Staff access
login.subtitle: Waiters, kitchen and administration. The admin assigns each account's role.
login.error_invalid: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
login.error_unknown: Could not sign in. Please try again.
login.demo_hint: Sample in-memory data — it resets on reload.

register.title: Create your restaurant
register.subtitle: Each restaurant is independent: its menu, staff and orders do not mix with others.
register.confirm_msg: We sent a link to confirm your admin account. Once confirmed you can sign in and set up your restaurant.
register.err_slug: Only letters, numbers and hyphens (min. 2 chars).
register.err_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.err_already_registered: That email already has an account. Sign in.
register.err_slug_taken: That slug is already taken. Choose another URL name.
register.err_unknown: Could not create the restaurant. Please try again.

kitchen.title: Kitchen
kitchen.subtitle: Tap the button when the dish is ready — nothing else.
kitchen.no_orders: No pending orders — all caught up

cashier.no_payment_methods: The admin has not set up payment methods yet.

admin.closed_chip: Closed — the public menu is not accepting orders

tour.welcome_desc: I'll show you in 30 seconds what each section does. You can repeat this guide any time with "View panel guide".
tour.resumen_desc: Quick daily overview: revenue, average ticket, sales by payment method and top products.
tour.plano_desc: Design the floor: drag tables, adjust seats, merge them and print each table's QR.
tour.pedidos_desc: Live order board by status: received → preparing → ready → delivered.
tour.historial_desc: Order history and cash register summary (totals by payment method) for any period.
tour.menu_desc: Create dishes, upload photos and activate/deactivate them; the customer menu updates instantly.
tour.categorias_desc: Organise the menu into categories (Starters, Desserts…).
tour.meseros_desc: Register team members (waiter, kitchen, cashier), assign role and shift, or permanently remove them.
tour.pagos_desc: Define how the cashier charges: cash, card, transfer or whatever you add.
tour.temporada_desc: Open/close the restaurant and set the season; control whether the QR accepts orders.
tour.ajustes_desc: Restaurant name, logo and admin accounts.
tour.multirestaurant_desc: This platform supports multiple restaurants in a single deployment. To create a second location visit /nuevo-restaurante — each has its own menu, team, tables and orders, completely separate.
tour.horarios_desc: Set each employee’s weekly schedule; every worker sees it after signing in.

dashboard.no_sales: No sales in this period yet.
dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Revenue, charges by method and what sells most — in the chosen period.
dashboard.create_hint: No restaurant is registered in this deployment yet.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Live floor orders. QR menu orders appear here and on the waiter's tablet.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: They organise the public menu and panel filters.

staff.title: Staff & shifts
staff.subtitle: Register, remove, set vacation and rotate shifts for floor, kitchen and cashier staff.

payments.title: Payment methods
payments.subtitle: Define how the cashier charges. Add what you use (cash, card, transfer, QR…) and toggle them.

season.title: Season & hours
season.subtitle: Control whether the restaurant accepts orders and which season you're in.
season.preview_closed: "Closed for the season — we'll be back soon"
season.preview_note: This is what customers see when scanning the QR.
season.season_cerrado: Closed — the public menu is not accepting orders

settings.title: Restaurant settings
settings.subtitle: Restaurant identity and accounts with panel access.
settings.restaurant_name_hint: Updated across the whole system: panel, waiter tablet and customer menu.
settings.admins_hint: Each admin signs in with their email. The owner account cannot be deleted.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Orders and cash register summary for the selected period.

schedule.title: Work schedule
schedule.subtitle: Weekly shifts per employee. Each worker sees their schedule after signing in.

toast.category_has_products: Move its products to another category first
toast.owner_protected: The owner account cannot be deleted
toast.call_attended: Call attended — waiter on the way

connect.title: Connect your Supabase
connect.subtitle: Paste your project URL and publishable key. The app will leave demo mode and use your database (empty, from scratch).
connect.hint: Find them in Supabase → Project Settings → API. The publishable key is safe for the client.
connect.error_invalid: Check the URL (https://…supabase.co) and the key.
